## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest` (backend)
- [ ] `cargo test` (contracts)
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm build` (frontend)

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable
- [ ] Tests added/updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant
- [ ] Security implications considered
- [ ] Migration or breaking-change notes included if needed
